name: Hiroshi Tanaka
title: President & Chief Executive Officer
bio: CEO since 2014. Led transformation of Apex into multi-asset global manager with $450B AUM. 35+ years in asset management with prior leadership roles at major Japanese and global institutions.
background: MBA University of Tokyo, BS Economics Waseda University

name: Margaret Chen
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Oversees all investment strategies and portfolio management. 28 years in global asset management with deep expertise across equities, fixed income, and alternatives.
background: MBA Stanford Graduate School of Business, BS Finance National Taiwan University

name: David Richardson
title: Chief Operating Officer
bio: Manages firm operations, technology, and infrastructure. Prior COO at major international asset manager. 25 years in financial services operations and technology.
background: MBA INSEAD, BS Engineering Oxford University

name: Yuki Yamamoto
title: Head of Asia Pacific Equities
bio: Leads $165B Asia-focused equity platform. Deep knowledge of Japanese, Korean, and emerging Asian markets. 22 years in Asia equity investing.
background: MBA Keio University, BS Mathematics Tokyo Tech

name: Sophie Dubois
title: Head of Fixed Income
bio: Manages $140B global fixed income platform including bonds, credit, and rates strategies. 24 years in fixed income markets globally.
background: MBA HEC Paris, BA Economics Sciences Po Paris

name: Robert Thompson
title: Head of Americas
bio: Regional head overseeing Apex's $155B Americas investment operations. Manages relationships with major US institutional investors. 20 years in US asset management.
background: MBA Columbia Business School, BS Finance University of Pennsylvania

name: Priya Sharma
title: Head of Alternatives
bio: Leads $80B alternatives platform including real assets, infrastructure, and private equity. 18 years in alternatives investing globally.
background: MBA Indian Institute of Management, BS Engineering Indian Institute of Technology

name: Hans Mueller
title: Chief Risk Officer
bio: Manages risk framework across all strategies and investments. 26 years in risk management at major global financial institutions.
background: PhD Finance University of Zurich, MS Applied Mathematics Swiss Federal Institute of Technology

name: Lisa Wong
title: Global Head of Investor Relations
bio: Manages relationships with 2,800+ institutional and retail investors globally. Responsible for $85B in new capital raised annually.
background: MBA Nanyang Technological University, BA Communications University of Singapore

name: Michael O'Brien
title: General Counsel & Chief Compliance Officer
bio: Leads legal, compliance, and regulatory affairs across 28 global offices. 22 years as counsel in international asset management.
background: JD Harvard Law School, BA International Relations Georgetown University
